content: packages/core/README.md package exports table must match actual package.json exports. Only list entry points that exist: '@bt-studio/core' (main, includes builder+activity), '@bt-studio/core/tsx', '@bt-studio/core/inspector'. No './builder' or './activity' sub-entry exist.
CLAUDE.md packages list: studio (TBD) facade must be KEPT alongside cli, studio-plugins, studio-mcp — facade hasn't shipped yet. Previous builder erroneously removed it.
README.md Package Exports table must include ALL studio packages: cli, studio-server, studio-ui, studio-transport, studio-common, studio-plugins, studio-mcp — not just the new additions.

Canonical quality gate for behavior-tree-ist is 'yarn install && yarn check' — runs build + lint + typecheck + tests across full monorepo. Individual commands (yarn test, yarn lint, yarn typecheck) may pass in isolation while missing cross-workspace errors. This gate is enforced in config.yaml, builder.md, lead.md, and reviewer.md.
